descriptions.en: The entity types that should be included in the export: `Legislation` or `Decision`
descriptions.de: The entity types that should be included in the export: `Legislation` or `Decision`

descriptions.en: The encodings that should be included in the export: `json`, `xml`, `pdf`, `text`, and `html`
descriptions.de: The encodings that should be included in the export: `json`, `xml`, `pdf`, `text`, and `html`

descriptions.en: Filter entities based on the date of the modification. When no date is given, the full dataset will be exported
descriptions.de: Filter entities based on the date of the modification. When no date is given, the full dataset will be exported
